sections.paragraph:
f. (from the root שֹׁוא No. 1)-

(1) a storm, tempest, so called from noise and crashing, Pro 1:27 (שַׁאֲוָה כתיב); Eze 38:9.

(2) desolation, often coupled by paronom. with the syn. מְשֹׁואָה Zep 1:15. Hence desolate regions, ruins, Job 30:3, 14 Job 30:14 38:27 .

(3) destruction, especially sudden, ruin, Psa 63:10 לְשֹׁואָה יְבַקְּשׁוּ נַפְשִׁי “they lay wait for my life that they may destroy it,” Isa 10:3 47:11 Psa 35:8.
